title: reSpearite (Spear Resprite)
description: Changes models of spears and adds animations to them
body:
This texture pack changes every spear's model and adds slight animations to higher-tier ones. This pack is, essentially, a stripped down version of my other texture pack REanimate and only having spears in it.

## Spears as items:
![Spear item icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3402f4399691cfb1b36fa2967fef0e67df9228ab.webp)
